A1_1.title: Review and select appropriate techniques, procedures and methods to undertake tasks
A1_1.response: Example 1: Morupule A Coal Feeder 3C Failing to Feed Coal into the Pulverizing Mill. On 23 February 2025 during a night shift, Unit 3 at Morupule A Power Station experienced a load drop from 21.8 MW to 16.8 MW, despite a stable fuel feed rate. I identified erratic speed fluctuations in coal feeder 3C via the DCS and confirmed the correlation through trend analysis. After a field inspection revealed abnormal mechanical noise, I conducted a rapid risk assessment and isolated mill 3C to prevent equipment damage. I coordinated with Mechanical Maintenance and led a Failure Modes and Effects Analysis (FMEA). Visual inspection and test runs indicated chain slippage despite normal sprocket rotation. Maintenance records confirmed a recent sprocket replacement, leading me to recommend chain tensioning. The adjustment resolved the issue, and I restored the generator to 22.0 MW within three hours. Aligned with BPC Maduo 2026 strategy for asset reliability, I recommended a Root Cause Analysis (RCA) to prevent recurrence and improve coal feeder system integrity.
